news.headline: Retail operators from the US went on a trip to explore Fontina cheese in Italy, visiting pastures and production sites.
news.summary: From June 9 to 11, 2024, GDO operators from the US participated in a familiarization trip to explore the Fontina PDO territories in Milan. The trip featured visits to the mountain pastures and production sites of the renowned cheese. This initiative provided valuable insights for the participants and highlighted the unique qualities of Fontina PDO.

news.headline: McLaren Trophy America debuts in 2025 with 10 rounds at prominent US circuits like Indy Motor Speedway & Circuit of the Americas. Artura Trophy car featured.
news.summary: A new championship called McLaren Trophy America is set to launch with a total of 10 rounds scheduled. The championship will include races at prestigious tracks such as the Indianapolis Motor Speedway and Circuit of the Americas. It is worth noting that the series will support the GT World Challenge America powered by AWS. The highlight of the championship will be the use of a specially designed Artura Trophy race car that will be maintained and managed by independent race teams.

news.headline: Bank First implements UFS's Empowered Core Banking Platform, supporting growth - July 1, 2024.
news.summary: Bank First, based in Manitowoc, Wisconsin, disclosed on July 1, 2024, its adoption of the Empowered Core banking technology platform created by UFS, a renowned technology provider for community banks. This initiative, which involved utilizing cutting-edge technology, aims to facilitate Bank First's expansion efforts. The company's stock trades on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol BFC.

news.headline: Comcast appoints Javier Garcia as Senior VP of Sales & Marketing in Central Division based in Atlanta, spanning 12 states.
news.summary: Comcast has appointed Javier Garcia as the Senior Vice President of Sales & Marketing for its Central Division, based in Atlanta, Georgia. In this position, Garcia will be responsible for leading sales and marketing efforts across a 12-state region, overseeing brand and product marketing, sales, and customer retention strategies. With almost ten years of experience at Comcast, Garcia brings a wealth of expertise to his new role.

news.headline: Quatrro named to the Channel Futures 2024 MSP 501 list, among world's top managed service providers.
news.summary: Quatrro Business Support Services (Quatrro) has recently been recognized as one of the leading managed service providers globally in the esteemed 2024 Channel Futures MSP 501 rankings. This list highlights the top companies in the industry, with Quatrro securing a notable position based on their exceptional services. This accolade emphasizes Quatrro's position as a premier player in the field, solidifying their reputation for excellence in managed services.

news.headline: California and Australia are partnering to trial sensors in the San Joaquin River Delta to monitor water quality.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, it was announced in San Francisco that a collaboration has been established between California and Australia to deploy unique sensors for monitoring water quality in the Sacramento-San Joaquin River Delta. This delta is vital for agriculture and ecology in the Bay Area. The sensors, created by CSIRO, will provide valuable data to help safeguard this important water body.

news.headline: DuPont to exhibit custom Kalrez parts at SEMICON West 2024, emphasizing on customer partnerships, supply assurance, innovation, and sustainability in the semiconductor sector. Event from July 9-11 in San Francisco. ($DD)
news.summary: DuPont (NYSE: DD) reaffirms its commitment to showcasing successful customer partnerships, consistent supply, technological advancement, and environmental responsibility in the semiconductor sector at SEMICON West in San Francisco from July 9 to 11, 2024.

news.headline: T-Mobile ranked first in overall network experience metrics in Opensignal's report, with fastest 5G download speeds.
news.summary: Bellevue, Washington - T-Mobile, trading under NASDAQ as TMUS, has emerged as the leading 5G network in the United States, according to Opensignal’s latest report. The company secured the top position for all network experience metrics, showcasing its dominance in the industry. T-Mobile has not only achieved the fastest 5G download speeds but also excelled in various other aspects of network performance. This achievement positions T-Mobile ahead of its competitors, making it the most decorated 5G network in the country.

news.headline: U.S. stocks extend first-half gains, with Dow increasing by 210 points. Live updates available.
Poland to offer subsidies on expensive mortgages amidst economic recovery with increasing interest rates.
Cosmo Prof® hosts Second Annual Iconic Blonde Virtual Event for beauty professionals to learn latest blonding techniques. Register now!
news.summary: At Cosmo Prof's Iconic Blonde Virtual Event, stylists have the opportunity to enhance their skills in balayage, achieve stunning lived-in and beachy tones, and master the popular money piece technique. Registration is open for the event, where participants can learn the newest blonding techniques. This annual event offers stylists a chance to unlock their artistry in creating beautiful blonde looks.

news.headline: Fannie Mae released its 2023 Corporate Responsibility and Impact Report, previously known as ESG, highlighting actions and innovations.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Fannie Mae (OTCQB: FNMA) issued its 2023 Corporate Responsibility and Impact (CRI) Report in Washington. This report, formerly named the Environmental, Social, and Governance Report, outlines Fannie Mae's initiatives and advancements. The CRI Report showcases the company's efforts in different areas and demonstrates its commitment to corporate responsibility.

news.headline: Bloomberg reports on the latest sector and industry performance data. Keep up with the trends!

Global Application Security Market set to reach $55.0 billion by 2029, with CAGR of 10.3%, driven by tech giants like IBM, HCL, Synopsys, Microfocus, and Capgemini. Rising cyber threats, use of cloud-based technologies, and adoption of AI and machine learning contribute to market growth. Budget constraints and ROI concerns act as restraints. In-depth report available on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: The global Application Security Market is projected to increase from USD 33.7 billion in 2024 to USD 55.0 billion by 2029, with a CAGR of 10.3%. This growth is driven by the escalating cyber threats targeting cloud-based applications and APIs, as well as the heightened reliance on applications. Key drivers include the rise in security breaches, while opportunities lie in the adoption of AI and machine learning. However, budget constraints and ROI concerns act as restraints. Noteworthy companies in the market include IBM, HCL, Synopsys, and Cloudflare. The surge in mobile and cloud-based technologies has necessitated enhanced security measures, leading to a rise in favorable government regulations and compliance mandates. The OWASP ASVS Project provides guidelines for secure web application development to mitigate risks. Market dynamics and trends underpin the growth and evolution of the Application Security industry.

news.headline: Global cardiac mapping market to reach USD 5.5 billion by 2034, exhibiting 5.8% CAGR. North America leads with advanced technology.
news.summary: The global cardiac mapping market was valued at US$3 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach US$5.5 billion by 2034, growing at a CAGR of 5.8% between 2024-2034. This market is driven by technological advancements and the rising prevalence of cardiovascular diseases, particularly atrial fibrillation and other arrhythmias. Innovations in cardiac mapping systems, such as 3D electroanatomic mapping, are enhancing diagnostic accuracy and treatment effectiveness. The market is also seeing increased adoption of minimally invasive procedures, fueled by advancements in catheter technology. North America leads the market due to high healthcare expenditure and advanced infrastructure. The urgent need for advanced diagnostic tools for cardiovascular diseases, the increasing aging population, and the growing emphasis on research and development in healthcare are key factors propelling the growth of the cardiac mapping market.

news.headline: Forum Brands acquires EVER Skincare from Stella & Dot Brands, expanding in health & wellness sector.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Forum Brands, a company specializing in consumer brands for families, revealed its acquisition of EVER from Stella & Dot Brands. EVER, renowned for its clean skincare products, utilizes the patented LSR10 to deliver high-quality results. This acquisition marks an important move in the industry, emphasizing Forum Brands' commitment to expanding its portfolio.

news.headline: Tempest and SnapSea partner to boost destination marketing with user-generated content solutions. Philadelphia, July 1, 2024.
news.summary: A partnership has been formed to improve destination marketing efforts and increase user engagement to attract more visitors. Tempest, a prominent company specializing in website, digital marketing, and software solutions for destination marketing, is at the forefront of this initiative. The collaboration aims to leverage advanced user-generated content solutions to enhance overall marketing strategies. This development comes as of July 1, 2024, in Philadelphia, signaling a new era in boosting visitation numbers and promoting destinations effectively.

news.headline: Huron's Desiderio, Gallas, Pavelec, and Willhelm named top consultants by Consulting Magazine, recognized for client service.
news.summary: Huron, a global professional services firm listed on the NASDAQ as HURN, revealed that Mario Desiderio, Jim Gallas, Jennifer Pavelec, and Mike Willhelm have all been acknowledged as Top Consultants for the year 2024 by Consulting Magazine. This recognition showcases their dedication to providing top-tier client service and influential contributions to their clients, colleagues, and the industry as a whole. Their exceptional talent was highlighted by Consulting Magazine through these prestigious accolades.

news.headline: Private investment firm Good Springs Capital LP invests in Kimbel Mechanical Systems in the industrial sector on July 1, 2024.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Good Springs Capital LP, a private investment firm specializing in collaborations with industrial and services sector founders, families, and entrepreneurial management teams, revealed that entities under its management successfully finalized a deal.

news.headline: SugarCRM wins 2024 Sales & Marketing Sammy Award for 4th year, named "Product of the Year" by Business Intelligence Group.
news.summary: In San Francisco, the renowned intelligence-driven sales automation platform provider, SugarCRM, has received the prestigious “Product of the Year” award from the Business Intelligence Group as part of The Sammys 2024 Sales and Marketing Technology Awards program. This recognition celebrates the exceptional efforts of organizations in addressing the common obstacles faced in engaging and working with potential clients and customers. SugarCRM's remarkable achievement marks its fourth consecutive win of the Sammy award.

news.headline: Neuroglee Health chosen for CMS GUIDE Model Program, to aid patients and caregivers in dementia care. Company evolves name. (Characters: 121)
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Boston, Neuroglee Health, a prominent provider of cognitive care solutions, revealed that they have been chosen to assist patients and caregivers in the Center for Medicare and Medicaid Innovation's (CMMI's) Guiding an Improved Dementia Experience (GUIDE) Model. This model focuses on enhancing the experience for individuals affected by dementia and is a significant opportunity for Neuroglee Health to make a difference in this field. This selection emphasizes the company's expertise and dedication to improving the lives of those dealing with cognitive impairments.

news.headline: NUBURU's CEO to be interviewed on TV in a multi-part series on July 3 on FMW Media's "New To The Street" show. (Characters: 107)
news.summary: NUBURU, Inc., a prominent player in high-power industrial blue laser technology, will be showcased in a multi-part TV series on FMW Media's "New To The Street" business TV show. The series will feature an extensive interview with NUBURU's CEO Brian Knaley. The first interview is scheduled for July 3 and will involve CEO Brian Knaley and host Jane King. They will delve into NUBURU's value proposition and its strategic direction. NUBURU's stock is listed as OTC: BURU.

news.headline: Equipment Controls Company (ECCO) acquires Tri-State Meter and Regulator Service, Inc, creating premier natural gas industry service with unparalleled innovation. (Words: 26)
news.summary: In a groundbreaking move set to reshape the natural gas industry, NORCROSS, Georgia witnesses the merger of two major players on July 1, 2024. Equipment Controls Company (ECCO), renowned for its offerings in natural gas measurement and control, joins forces with another company to create a powerhouse of service and innovation. The partnership aims to leverage ECCO’s dominance in the market and capitalize on its reputation for delivering top-notch products. This merger is poised to set new standards with unparalleled services, promising a future marked by cutting-edge solutions in the natural gas sector.

news.headline: GoNetspeed finishes network construction in Ludlow, giving 100% fiber internet to over 4,800 homes and businesses.
news.summary: A network construction project by GoNetspeed in Ludlow, Massachusetts is finished, making it the second community in the state to have access to the company's high-speed internet services. This completion enables over 4,800 residences and businesses in Ludlow to enjoy 100% fiber internet connectivity. The newly established future-proof network offers symmetric speeds and advanced capabilities, enhancing internet access for the local population.

news.headline: Canton Network's Global Synchronizer and Canton Coin debut, marking industry milestones with the launch of the first public infrastructure and utility token.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Zurich, major players in the Canton Network unveiled the Global Synchronizer, marking a significant milestone as the network's inaugural public infrastructure. Additionally, they introduced Canton Coin, the network's utility token. This launch signifies a trailblazing moment in the industry as these advancements are the first of their kind. The Canton Network now boasts key features that promise to redefine the sector, with impressive utility token metrics and infrastructure capabilities setting new standards.

news.headline: Dominion Energy Virginia offers energy-saving tips and bill payment assistance for summer. Customers can save on energy use and get help with bills.
news.summary: In Richmond, Virginia, on July 1, 2024, Dominion Energy is emphasizing the importance of conserving energy during the summer season. As temperatures rise, customers are urged to follow easy energy-saving guidelines to reduce their consumption. Additionally, Dominion Energy offers various programs to assist customers in decreasing their energy usage and provides aid with bill payments.

news.headline: Opera GX browser for gamers is introducing new AI features through Aria update. Opera is listed on NASDAQ as OPRA.
news.summary: A major update is being introduced to the built-in AI, Aria, of Opera GX, the browser designed for gamers, in Oslo, Norway as of July 1, 2024. This update showcases the newest AI capabilities from Opera (NASDAQ: OPRA), encompassing their ongoing AI Feature experimental releases.

news.headline: Delta Design Structures partners with Daiken to launch Gravio Wall Panels in US, known for sustainable design and easy installation.
news.summary: A company called Delta Design Structures has introduced the Gravio Wall Panels at the AIA24 Expo in Washington, DC. These panels offer a sustainable design, easy installation, and a Class A fire rating. Manufactured by Daiken, the Gravio Wall Panels are made from "Shirasu," or volcanic ash, and are known for their innovative modular system that allows for simple installation and customization. This unveiling took place in Washington, DC, garnering attention for its new approach to vertical wall panels in the construction industry.

news.headline: Yard Force introduces 1200W Solar Power Station at Mitre 10 stores in Australia for sustainable and portable power.
news.summary: Yard Force, a renowned outdoor power equipment brand, has introduced their latest innovation, the Yard Force 1200W Solar Power Station, now accessible at Mitre 10 outlets throughout Australia. This cutting-edge solar power unit offers sustainable, dependable, and mobile power, catering to the needs of outdoor adventurers, homeowners, and those prioritizing emergency readiness. The Yard Force 1200W Solar Power Station is tailored to effectively capture solar energy, serving as an indispensable energy source.

news.headline: SH Hotels & Resorts to launch 1 Hotel & Homes in San Miguel de Allende in 2027, redefining luxury. By hospitality visionary Barry Sternlicht.
news.summary: In Miami on July 1, 2024, SH Hotels & Resorts, a sustainable hotel brand management company established by Barry Sternlicht, revealed the upcoming launch of 1 Hotel & Homes San Miguel de Allende. Scheduled to welcome guests in 2027, this property aims to set new standards in luxury hospitality.

news.headline: Market players collaborate with Linux Foundation to establish Global Synchronizer Foundation, overseeing Global Synchronizer - part of Canton Network. ZURICH, July 1, 2024 /PRNewswire.
news.summary: A new organization called the Global Synchronizer Foundation (GSF) has been established in Zurich on July 1, 2024, to oversee the governance of the Global Synchronizer, which serves as the interoperability backbone of the Canton Network. This community initiative aims to ensure transparent and neutral management of the Global Synchronizer platform and facilitate its efficient operation. The foundation will play a crucial role in maintaining the integrity and effectiveness of the network, which boasts a significant user base and plays a key role in promoting connectivity among various blockchain projects. The establishment of the GSF reflects the community's commitment to promoting trust and collaboration within the ecosystem.

news.headline: L3Harris Tech (NYSE:LHX) to unveil Q2 2024 earnings on July 25 after market close; earnings call on July 26 at 8:30 a.m. ET. Listen at L3Harris.com. Dial-in numbers: (U.S.) 877-407-6184, (Int'l) +1 201-389-0877.
news.summary: L3Harris Technologies (NYSE:LHX) is set to announce its financial results for the second quarter of 2024 on July 25, 2024, after the market closes. The company will conduct an earnings call at 8:30 a.m. ET on July 26, 2024. Interested individuals can participate in the webcast on L3Harris.com. For the teleconference, participants can dial (U.S.) 877-407-6184 or (International) +1 201-389-0877, where they will be connected to an operator. The call will also be recorded for playback.

news.headline: Smithfield Foods delivers 34,000 pounds of protein to support disaster relief in Iowa, partnering with Mercy Chefs.
news.summary: A corporation has teamed up with Mercy Chefs to offer hot meals for individuals affected by flooding, along with first responders and volunteers. Recently, Smithfield Foods collaborated to transport 34,000 pounds of protein to Rock Valley, Iowa. The aim is to distribute complimentary, high-quality hot meals to victims in need.

news.headline: Renowned breast cancer specialist Elizabeth Comen, MD, joins NYU Langone Health's Perlmutter Cancer Center on July 1, 2024.
news.summary: Renowned breast cancer oncologist and women's health specialist, Dr. Elizabeth Comen, has recently joined NYU Langone Health's Perlmutter Cancer Center in New York. Dr. Comen, a well-respected figure in the field, has made significant contributions to breast cancer treatment. The Perlmutter Cancer Center is known for its cutting-edge research and comprehensive care, with Dr. Comen adding to its expertise. The move is expected to further enhance the center's capabilities in treating breast cancer, impacting the lives of many patients. This development comes as part of NYU Langone Health's ongoing efforts to provide top-quality healthcare, especially in the field of oncology.

news.headline: PureSphere's PureCarbon Filter M obtains NSF 42/372 certification for water purifiers in Seoul, Korea on July 1, 2024.
news.summary: PureSphere, led by CEO Lee Jihn-Koo, has revealed that their PureCarbon Filter M water purifier carbon filters have obtained NSF certification in Seoul, South Korea on July 1, 2024. This certification ensures the safety and effectiveness of the filter structure and leachability. The PureCarbon Filter M is designed to provide pure water by removing impurities through its advanced technology. This achievement highlights PureSphere's commitment to quality and customer satisfaction in the water purifier market.

news.headline: Manufacturing PMI at 48.5% in June 2024, signaling contraction in new orders, production, and employment. Prices increasing.
news.summary: In TEMPE, Arizona, as of July 1, 2024, recent data reveals a contraction in new orders and backlogs, as well as a decline in production and employment levels. Supplier deliveries have quickened, while raw materials inventories are decreasing. Customers' inventories remain insufficient. Additionally, prices are on the rise. Both exports and imports are also reported to be in a state of contraction.

news.headline: FDA mandates diversity action plan requirements for industry; TOTAL Diversity Clinical Trial Management available for immediate support.
news.summary: In Dallas on July 1, 2024, TOTAL Diversity Clinical Trial Management (TDCTM) discussed the FDA draft guidance issued on June 26, 2024, marking the commencement of implementing the Food and Drug Omnibus Reform Act (FDORA). The legislation is set to be enforced 180 days post its finalization.

news.headline: Wayne County Community College District and Schoolcraft College collaborate in culinary arts; agreement offers students unique opportunities.
news.summary: In Livonia, Michigan, as of July 1, 2024, Wayne County Community College District (WCCCD) and Schoolcraft College have joined forces for an innovative partnership in the culinary arts industry. This collaboration offers students an exclusive chance to benefit from a new agreement between the institutions, opening up opportunities for access to a...

news.headline: Solomon partners with NVIDIA to develop advanced robotics solutions at COMPUTEX 2024.
news.summary: In Taipei on July 1, 2024, Solomon, a prominent provider of cutting-edge vision and robotics technologies, revealed an exciting partnership with NVIDIA during COMPUTEX 2024. This collaboration aims to merge Solomon's innovative products with the NVIDIA Isaac robotics platform to elevate the capabilities of both companies.

news.headline: New Terminal One at JFK launches RFP for FF&E installation for CBP & TSA spaces to enhance passenger experience. Operations start in 2026.
news.summary: In Jamaica, New York, on July 1, 2024, the New Terminal One at John F. Kennedy International Airport in New York is focused on delivering a top-notch passenger experience starting in 2026. They have initiated a request for proposals (RFP) from service providers as part of this endeavor.

news.headline: Francis Ford Coppola Winery's "Perfect Your Pizza" competition offers Italian dream trip as grand prize.
news.summary: An Italian dream trip for pizza and wine enthusiasts is now available through Francis Ford Coppola Winery in Geyserville, California. The iconic Sonoma County wine estate is launching its third annual "Perfect Your Pizza" competition on July 1, 2024. The competition is in honor of the acclaimed "Diamond Collection" wine brand. Participating in the competition offers a chance to win a trip to Italy for those who appreciate the pairing of pizza and wine.

news.headline: Motorola Solutions releases 2023 Corporate Responsibility Report, focusing on environmental, social, and governance efforts. Safer communities emphasized.
news.summary: Motorola Solutions, a leading company in the field of communication technology, has recently published its annual Corporate Responsibility Report for 2023. This report focuses on the company's efforts and achievements in environmental sustainability, social responsibility, and governance practices. Through various programs and initiatives, Motorola Solutions aims to contribute to the safety and well-being of communities, schools, hospitals, and businesses worldwide. Greg Brown, the chairman and CEO of Motorola Solutions, reiterated the company's dedication to responsible operations and emphasized their ongoing commitment to creating a safer environment for all.

news.headline: Delta Community Credit Union opens applications for 2025 Philanthropic Fund program, awarding $150,000 to 20 local non-profits.
news.summary: An Atlanta-based credit union, Delta Community Credit Union, has announced that it will be awarding a total of $150,000 in grants to 20 local nonprofit organizations as part of its 2025 Philanthropic Fund program. The credit union has begun accepting grant applications for this program, continuing a tradition that has been ongoing for 12 years. This initiative is aimed at providing financial assistance to community organizations that work towards making a positive impact and uplifting the local community.

news.headline: Soft tissue repair market to reach $12.78B by 2034 with 5.6% CAGR. Rising diabetes-related gangrene cases driving demand.
news.summary: Rising cases of diabetes-related gangrene on a global scale are driving the need for soft tissue repair products, as per a recent report from Fact.MR. Released on July 1, 2024, the report indicates a significant increase in the number of individuals affected. This surge in demand is shaping the global soft tissue repair market, signaling a notable trend impacting the healthcare industry.

news.headline: DC Torque Tool Market projected to reach $4.4 billion by 2029 with a CAGR of 3.7% from $3.6 billion in 2024.
news.summary: New data released reveals that the DC Torque Tool Market in Chicago is projected to grow substantially, with an expected value of USD 4.4 billion by 2029 compared to USD 3.6 billion in 2024. This represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 3.7% between 2024 and 2029. The findings are from a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™, highlighting a noteworthy expansion in the market.

news.headline: Projected glacial acetic acid sales to reach USD 16521.8 million by 2034, with Asia Pacific leading in market share.
news.summary: During the forecast period, the Asia Pacific region is anticipated to maintain its leading position in the global glacial acetic acid market. With rapid industrialization and growing demand from end-user industries, the region is projected to hold the largest market share.

news.headline: Biden pushes Philippines on labor rights, focuses on workers' rights overseas.
news.summary: The Biden administration has long discussed its commitment to upholding workers' rights abroad, particularly beyond the Western Hemisphere; however, there have been limited concrete instances of such efforts being implemented.

news.headline: Hight Logistics expands all-electric fleet with 5 Volvo VNR Electric trucks, orders 9 for 2024 and 10 for Q1 2025.
news.summary: In Greensboro, North Carolina, on July 01, 2024, Hight Logistics, a privately-owned port drayage services business, is bolstering its all-electric fleet by introducing five zero-tailpipe emission Volvo VNR Electric trucks. The company's commitment to sustainability was further demonstrated at the recent Advanced Clean Transportation (ACT) Expo in Las Vegas, where Hight Logistics sealed a deal for an additional nine Volvo VNR Electric trucks scheduled for 2024 and ten more for the first quarter of 2025. To facilitate this expansion, Hight Logistics inaugurated the Hight Electric division, which is dedicated to procuring battery-electric vehicles and establishing charging infrastructure to support the fleet's growth.

news.headline: New labor laws going into effect in several states show their proactive stance on the issue amidst lack of national legislation.
news.summary: Starting this Monday, a plethora of fresh labor regulations will come into effect, underscoring states’ growing readiness to address the issue without substantial labor laws from Washington.

news.headline: New undisclosed political trade worth between $15,001 to $50,000 by Rudy Yakym on stock 32500 on June 25, 2024, filed on June 28, 2024.
